Data Collection Consent: The personal details provided in the form above (personal name, e-mail address) may be used by the workshop and shared task organizers, whose names are mentioned in the WMT26 website, for the purposes of identifying the submissions, analyzing the results and having correspondence with the participants for issues that may occur. Personal names and e-mail address specified at the respective fields are not going to be distributed publicly or to any other party and can be deleted at any point after a request of the participants. Evaluation system names and overarching participant names will be included in the analysis paper published in WMT26. Do you accept? Set the answer to 0 to give consent to data collection.
